hero.title: Your Bookmarks, Organized
hero.subtitle: A powerful bookmark manager for X/Twitter with smart collections, advanced filtering, and offline-first storage.

featuresSection.title: Powerful Features
featuresSection.subtitle: Everything you need to master your bookmarks

features.title: Custom Collections
features.description: Organize your bookmarks your way. Create custom collections to group related content, assign bookmarks to multiple collections, and keep everything neatly categorized.

features.title: Advanced Filtering
features.description: Find exactly what you need in seconds. Filter by time range, find threads, search for media content, or use tags to narrow down results. Powerful search makes finding bookmarks effortless.
highlights: Filter by time range (today, this week, all time)

features.title: X/Twitter Import
features.description: Bring all your Twitter/X bookmarks with you. Use our Chrome extension to easily import your saved tweets, complete with metadata, images, and thread context preserved.
highlights: Keep all your saved tweets organized

features.title: Tag Management
features.description: Keep your bookmarks organized with flexible tagging. Add multiple tags to each bookmark, filter by tags, and manage your tag library to build your own organizational system.

features.title: Data Export
features.description: Your data, your control. Export all your bookmarks, collections, and tags in standard JSON format. Perfect for backups, migrations, or sharing your curated content.
highlights: Export all data in JSON format
Keep full control of your data

features.title: Dark & Light Mode
features.description: Easy on the eyes, day or night. Switch between light and dark themes, or let the app automatically adjust based on your system preferences. Designed for comfort and readability.

features.title: Offline-First
features.description: Your bookmarks, always accessible. Everything stored locally in your browser for instant access, even without internet. No server required, complete privacy, lightning-fast performance.

cta.title: Ready to Organize Your Bookmarks?
cta.subtitle: Start managing your X/Twitter bookmarks better today
